use_cases: Toggle boolean settings and preferences in application interfaces
Enable or disable features with visual on/off state indicators
Use as a thematic sky-themed switch for decorative UI elements
Implement form controls for consent or toggle-based inputs
ai_summary: The Shamayim Toggle Switch is a stylized boolean input component featuring sky-inspired gradient backgrounds with multiple pattern options (conic, dots, grid, waves, stars, etc.). Built with customizable colors, shadows, and optional icons, this switch uses skeuomorphic design with depth effects. It supports mirrored layout and is ideal for SaaS applications, settings panels, or any interface requiring elegant on/off controls with decorative flair.
